titleStmt.title: SII 38.531: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 531. (A.R. No. 531 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, Chōḷēśvara temple, right of entrance.

p.hi: King: Rājakēśarivarman alias Tribhuvanachchakkravartti Kulōttuṅgachōḻa II Year: 13, 124th day: 1146 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. Commences with the meykīrtti of the king, Pu-maṉṉu padumam etc.,

It records the assignment of land tax (kāṇikkaḍaṉ) of one hundred and thirtythree and odd māḍai collected from the village, Śrīvāḷappūr in Kāṉakkiḷiyūr-nāḍu, by the ruler to expend for conducting offerings and worship to the god Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār. It is stated that the god was consecrated by a certain Vichchādiranāḍāḻvāṉ, the younger brother of Brahmādarāya Muttaraiyaṉ, a resident of Ūṟṟattūr. It is said that the former consecrated the god at the latter village which was in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Bhuvaṉamuḻuḍai-vaḷanāḍu. It is further stated that village Śiṟuvāḷāppūr was ceded as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili for the above purpose.
The supervisory officials of land revenue department, Maṇakkuḍaiyān Kuṉṟaṉkiḻāṉ, Neḍumaram-uḍaiyān and the royal secretary (tirumandira-ōlai) Aṉapāya Mūvēndavēḷāṉ figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaṉṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉ cey tavattāl paruti va
ḻittoṉṟi neṭumālivaṉe ṉaccuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Iru nilamakaḷai yurimaiyiṟ puṉa
rntuRead puṇarntutirumakaḷ maṇimulaic ceñcāntaṉaintu parumaṇi mārvam paṉivarai nikaṟpa jaya
makaḷ ceḻuñ cantaṉaccuvaṭṭāl puyamiru kayilaip poruppeṉat toṉṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉu me
komakaḷ cevvāyp pavaḷacceyoḷi paṭaittaṉaṉ yāṉeṉat tavaḷa naṉniṟan taṉittuṭaiye
ṉṉap pukaḻmakaḷ cintai makiḻac ciniyuḷilum yiru kuṭai nilavu poru paṭait tikiri velluṅ karuṅka
liyiruḷiṉait turappa niṭu pallūḻiyeḻa caṭippuṟattiluṅ koṭāc centaṉik koliṉi tulā
miṉai veñcilai Añcikaittu vāṉuyara ponneṭu per piṟappa puli viṟṟiruppa Umpariyāṉai Oreṭ
ṭiṉukkun tamapameṉṉat taṉittaṉi ticaitoṟum vicaiyastampa niṟppa cippakaiyātiyāṉatu ni
ṅka maṉṉuyir taḻaippa maṉuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavamum maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Ātiyan taṇarākuti cu
ṉalu miteḻu koṇṭala vicutaṇpuṉalum mekaRead metiṉiṉila viḷarum cātiyoḻukkamum niṟamum piṟappura tūni
maṉa ṇakkai māvum ta kala kaṉavilaṅkāṇṭaṟ kariteṉa varunti
puḷḷiṉa mallatu ciṟaiyeṉa paṭutaliṉṟi niṟai peruñcelvi moṭavaṉi vā
ḻap pallavar teluṅkar māḷavar kaliṅkar kocalar kaṉṉaṭar kiṭāri teṉṉara keraḷarThere seems to be some overwriting.ciṅkaṇar cetiyar tirikattar
vaṅkaraṅkar vattavar mattirar caṅkara coṉakar kaikaiyar jiṉa raiṉṟaṟai kaḻal ventarum pallāvaṇakkum muṟai
maiyāllurinta tiṟai kuṇantiṟaiñcavum poṉmalarkoṭic cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭi Oru maruṅkuṭan pakaran tiṉitiru
ppa Aruḷ parici paiyap poṟṟoṭi maiyyapāvaiyuñ civaṉum polap puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum cempoṉ
virasiṅhāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa
tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaivaḷaṉāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr ṉāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūril piramātarāya
muttarayaṉ tampi viraṇaviccātiraṉāṭāḻvāṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kulottuṅkacoḻa Īśvaramu
ṭaiyār koyilil tevarkanmikkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevarkku
veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatākak kāṉakkiḷiyūrnāṭṭuc ciṟuvaḷaippūr kāṇikkaṭaṉ poṉ
nūṟṟeṇpattaiṅ kaḻañcey muṉṟu mañcāṭiyu muṉṟu māvukkum nellu muppatteṇ ka
lane yiru tūṇi mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyuḻakkukkum tākkaciyarkku Eṟiṉa vāṇṭu celavāṉa māṭai nūṟ
ṟu muppattu muṉṟe mukkāleyarai māvum yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭamuṭ
paṭat tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilārum varikkukkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum Eḻun vari
yappa rājaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 3 nāḷ 100 2 10 4 Antarāyam pāṭṭa muṭpaṭat tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyiṭṭapaṭikku Ūravar Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūril pira
mātarāya muttaraiyan tampi caṉanātaṉ Araiyatevaṉāna vāṇa viccātiraṉāṭāḻvān Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kulottuṅkacoḻa Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku
veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka yāṇṭu patinmunṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭamuṭpaṭat tevatānaiṟaiyiliyiṭṭa kāṉakkiḷiyūr nāṭṭuc ciṟuvaḷaippūrk kā
ṇikkaṭan poṉ nūṟṟeṇpattaiṅ kaḻañcey munṟu mañcāṭiyu munṟu mā nel muppatteṇ kalane Iru tūṇi mukkuṟuṇi ṉānāḻiyuḻakkukku cuṅ
kantavirttacoḻatevarkku Eṟinavāṇṭu celavāna māṭai nūṟṟu muppattu munṟey mukkāle yaraimā yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu mutal Antarāya
m pāṭṭamuṭpaṭat tevatāṉaiṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam maṭakkuṭaiyān Eḻuttu puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭik kuṉ
ṟaṅkiḻān Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam neṭumaramuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kaḻanivāyiluṭaiyān Eḻuttu I
vai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kūṟṟūrkiḻavan Eḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyan Eḻuttu Ivai Ilāṭattaraiyan Eḻuttu Ivai villavarāyan Eḻuttu Ikka
lveṭṭu tirumukappaṭiyum Uḷvarippaṭiyum
pottaka kāṭṭac coṉṉām Ivvūr māṭai nūṟṟumuppatu muṉṟey mukkāleyaraimāvum yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭamuṭpaṭat tevatāṉa
Iṟaiyiliyākakkaiykoṇṭu Ittevarkku veṇṭum nimantañ celuttap paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉān tirumantiraolai Aṉapāyamuventa veḷāṉ Ivai malai
Digital edition of SII 38.531 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
